prompt:
Reference image role: the previous project covers define the style — dark ink-green base, glowing tech motif, restrained Eastern xianxia + tech fusion. Same color palette and mood.

Create a 16:9 project cover image for "Distributed Training 工程实践". NO text, NO logos.

Subject: A global star-network — many small luminous node points connected by glowing thin lines forming an organic web, spanning across the frame like a constellation map. Some nodes brighter than others (representing parameter servers). A faint sphere-like spatial hint suggests global topology. Soft firefly cyan glow on key nodes.

Composition: network spans the whole frame but denser on the right, left side has fewer connections leaving quiet space for text. Cinematic, professional.

Color HEX: base #0B211D, glow #9CF0BD, gold #C0A35D, jade #6A9580.

Avoid: company logos, readable text/numbers, characters, world map continents, neon purple, red, cartoonish, MMORPG.
